name: JengaBench
description: A deterministic visual benchmark for spatial reasoning and physical planning in an unstable Jenga tower.

binding_vow.description: Inspect rendered JengaBench camera views and return one structured ChangeViewpoint, Push, or PlaceBack action per turn.

observation_space.description: A PNG render from the current persistent camera viewpoint. The system_prompt includes camera state, phase, extraction count, available placement positions, and a windowed action log (last 5 entries, most recent first). Each log entry has three fields: saw (camera state before acting), did (the action taken), why (the outcome).

action_space.description: JSON action: ChangeViewpoint with compass direction, elevation layer, Close/Medium/Full distance, and optional target block; Push with layer, positional color, axial face, left/center/right contact, and Gentle/Firm/Hard intensity; or PlaceBack with an available Left/Middle/Right slot.

reward.description: Successful extractions score +1, valid camera changes and placements score 0, invalid actions score -0.5, collapse terminates the episode, and ten consecutive viewpoints terminate with -10.
